content: Self-Refine's iterative, training-free self-improvement framework can be extended to unify multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms by treating each inconsistent perspective from self-reflection methods like Self-Contrast and Mirror as an independent feedback iteration in the Self-Refine pipeline. This hybrid approach lets the LLM leverage diverse contradictory perspectives without requiring additional supervised training or reinforcement learning, combining the efficiency of Self-Refine with the error-detection power of multi-perspective reflection.
